reviews.review_title: This can get you seriously sick!
reviews.review_description:
Not sure how these experiences reach the store without anyone object them as inappropriate or potentially dangerous. Couldnt stand the spinning wheel for more than a minute and now i am spinning myself. The basic breathing shapes were ok (just ok), hence the two stars instead of one, otherwise terrible! 
- changed my mind as still spinning! One star...

I read the other review on here and thought the person was being dramatic. I don't get sick from VR and I'm a little tired of VR mostly catering to people who do, but this showed me I'm not completely impervious to it. It took seconds for me to have a headache and some nausea.

reviews.review_title: Its an app to help you focus your breath
reviews.review_description: There is absolutely no motion sicknesses. If you can't handle moving objects, then maybe VR is not for you.
